metadata.name: Analyze Bulk vs. Packaged Logistics Cost

description: A planner needs to decide whether it's more cost-effective to ship a large order as a full bulk tanker or as packaged drums.

nodes.task_description: Get a freight quote for a full bulk tanker shipment to the customer's location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent obtains a quote of $3,000 for a bulk shipment.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total cost for a packaged shipment, including the cost of drums, palletizing labor, and less-than-truckload (LTL) freight.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the total packaged cost to be $4,500.

nodes.task_description: Compare the costs and recommend the more economical bulk shipping option.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the bulk option as cheaper and makes the recommendation.
